meta.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; every constant below is copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 068 block / idea file at the pin above

model.sides: n proposers (labelled men) x n receivers (labelled women), each with a STRICT COMPLETE ranking of the other side
model.rank_convention: 1-indexed, 1 = top choice (internal arrays are 0-based; every published rank adds 1)
model.profile_space: uniform: all (n!)^(2n) profiles equally weighted; exact census at every n in n_exact
model.proposing_side: men (men-proposing deferred acceptance returns mu_M; women-proposing returns mu_W)
model.stable_set: obtained INDEPENDENTLY of GS by exhaustive stability testing of all n! perfect matchings (stable iff no (m, w) mutually prefer each other to their assigned partners); GS optimality is a checked claim (F6), never an assumption

metrics.pbar: E[man rank in mu_M] (= E[woman rank in mu_W] by the symmetry gate)
metrics.rbar: E[woman rank in mu_M] (= E[man rank in mu_W])
metrics.delta_conditional: via the per-profile receiver tax g(p) = mean_w rank_w(mu_M) - mean_w rank_w(mu_W) >= 0 (convention C5): delta|unique = E[g | unique], delta|multi = E[g | multi]; E[g] = rbar - pbar is an exact relabelling identity and is GATED
metrics.m_prop: P(some proposer has a profitable misreport under men-proposing DA, others fixed)
metrics.m_recv: P(some receiver has a profitable misreport under men-proposing DA, others fixed)
metrics.misreport_space: all n! - 1 alternative strict complete rankings for one agent, everyone else truthful; profitable = strictly better partner under the TRUE preference (convention C2)

reject.reading: all three clauses AND-ed at the decision cell n = 3, exact-rational comparisons

decision.invalid: any F1-F6 gate failure (controls misbehaving - report, no ruling)
null_axes: band-straddle: delta(3) in (1/20, 1/5), or f(3) in (1/20, 1/5), or the manipulation-asymmetry clause alone fails
gap-localization failure without gate failure (delta(3|unique) != 0 exactly)
twin-arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis

hand_world_f4.note: the two n = 2 multi-stable profiles, walked by hand at registration (0-based indices)

profile_1.reading: men (w0 > w1, w1 > w0), women (m1 > m0, m0 > m1); men-proposing gives each man his top; women-proposing gives each woman her top; matching rendered as wife[m]

degeneracy_f5.slice: all men share one identical ranking OR all women share one identical ranking (union slice; the two families reported separately)
degeneracy_f5.claim: unique stable matching on every slice profile (serial dictatorship of the agreed order): f = 0 on each family exactly, per-profile receiver tax g = 0 on every slice profile exactly (C5 reading - the side-choice has zero leverage there)

arm_r.status: REPORTING-ONLY - no statistical gate rides Arm R; its sole gates are the draw-count sentinel and exact reproducibility

main_leg.per_episode: draw 2n uniform rankings (pinned order: all n men then all n women, each an in-runner Fisher-Yates shuffle, C9), run GS both ways; estimates delta-hat(n) and f-hat(n) (f via the corner inequality mu_M != mu_W, C4)

stability_leg.per_episode: same draw discipline; GS both ways PLUS the bounded exhaustive stability enumeration (n <= 6 -> <= 720 matchings, C12); estimates E|S|, f (enumerated), delta|multi; re-verifies C4 and the corner landing on every episode

m_recv_prefix.reading: M_recv-hat(n) is measured on the deterministic PREFIX of the stability-leg episode stream (no extra RNG draws), full n!-1 misreport search per receiver with the DGS prune (C6)

arm_r.aux_rule: reserved, NEVER read by any leg (the P054-P067 aux convention; constructor-registry assertion, C8)

seeds_registration.note: the drafter's registered set IS the session seed set (V077-V080 precedent; no new allocation this slice); 20261590-593 are P067/V080's registered set and the gap 20261594-599 is the disclosed in-flight buffer, unused; registry high-water after this slice: 20261603 (reserved; highest READ 20261602)

runtime_pins.byte_identity: stdout and results.json byte-identical across two full process runs (external diff + sha256)

conventions.C1: encoding: preferences are 0-based permutation tuples (mp[m] = m's ranked women best-first; wp[w] likewise); a matching is wife[m]; every PUBLISHED rank is 1-indexed; profiles uniform weight 1
conventions.C2: manipulation: misreports range over all n!-1 alternative complete strict rankings of ONE agent (everyone else truthful); profitable = strictly better partner under the TRUE preference; at the census cells the misreported profile is itself a census profile, so both arms resolve misreports by corner LOOKUP into their own full-census corner tables (Arm A: GS corners; Arm B: enumerated-lattice corners)
conventions.C3: the F1 symmetry gate is realized as same-pass relabelled accumulators: E[man rank in mu_M] == E[woman rank in mu_W] and E[woman rank in mu_M] == E[man rank in mu_W] exactly, f/E|S| relabelling-invariant by construction, and the manipulation counts computed in BOTH directions (some-woman-gains under women-proposing == M_prop count; some-man-gains under women-proposing == M_recv count)
conventions.C4: Arm-R main-leg multiplicity reads f-hat = P(mu_M != mu_W): mu_M = mu_W <=> |S| = 1 is the polarization-sandwich corollary, proven exhaustively at every census cell by F2a and RE-VERIFIED by enumeration on every stability-leg episode; a single counterexample reds the battery
conventions.C5: conditional gaps ride the per-profile receiver tax g(p) = mean_w rank_w(mu_M) - mean_w rank_w(mu_W) >= 0: delta|unique = E[g|unique] with the stronger per-profile gate g == 0 on EVERY unique profile; delta|multi = E[g|multi]; the relabelling identity E[g] = rbar - pbar is gated EXACTLY (this is the reading under which the registered decomposition delta = f * delta|multi and the registered F5 'delta = 0 on the slice' are simultaneously exact; the naive slice-restricted rbar - pbar is NOT relabelling-closed on the F5 families and is published beside it as reporting)
conventions.C6: Arm-R M_recv-hat: deterministic prefix of the stability-leg stream (sizes in arm_r.m_recv_prefix), full misreport search with the Demange-Gale-Sotomayor prune (only receivers with mu_M(w) != mu_W(w) can gain, and no gain can beat mu_W(w)); the prune is VERIFIED exhaustively at every census cell (every successful census misreport is checked against both DGS clauses)
conventions.C7: twin decision evaluators: evaluator 1 reads Arm-A Fractions with Fraction comparisons; evaluator 2 reads Arm-B integers with cross-multiplied integer comparisons; both apply the registered order literally (REJECT first, then INVALID on any F1-F6 failure, then APPROVE, then NULL with named axes) and must agree on the token AND the axes
conventions.C8: seed registry: every random.Random construction appends to a registry; the accepted run asserts the registry == [20261600, 20261601, 20261602] in that order and that 20261603 is never constructed or read
conventions.C9: Fisher-Yates implemented IN-RUNNER (never random.shuffle): for i in n-1..1: j = rng.randrange(i+1); swap; draw order per episode: men 0..n-1 then women 0..n-1; the shuffle sentinel asserts exactly 2n * episodes shuffles per leg per size
conventions.C10: canonical serialization: results.json with sort_keys and explicit separators; every exact value rendered as the canonical Fraction string p/q (or integer); float renderings are 6-decimal strings derived from the Fractions; no timestamps, no environment reads beyond the version assert
conventions.C11: presentation: Random(20261602) selects 5 stability-leg display rows per size for stdout; read by the presentation leg ONLY
conventions.C12: stability enumeration: exhaustive over all n! permutation matchings with an early-exit blocking-pair scan in the proposer's preference order; bound n <= 6 (<= 720 matchings) as registered

disclosed_landing.note: drafter-disclosed, re-derived from scratch and never trusted; the F3 anchors above ARE the disclosed n <= 3 values (a mismatch is simultaneously an INVALID gate finding and a first-class anomaly); clause margins disclosed at registration: delta 1.30x, f 1.31x, m_recv 1.85x over their lines; the n = 2 cell is the registered NULL straddle (delta = f = 1/8 in-band, m_recv = 0); arm-R expected to continue the rise toward the classic ln n vs n/ln n asymptotic (reporting-only)
